changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: Demographics CRF schema (1 crf + 1 crf_version + 2 sections + 5 items + 1 response_set + 5 item_form_metadata + 3 event-definition CRF links)

column.name: description
column.value: Subject identification and baseline vitals captured at study visits.

column.name: instructions
column.value: Source-document fields. Do not re-enter the Subject ID — it is pre-filled from the matrix.

column.name: instructions
column.value: Captured at the visit, before any study intervention.

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: 3 study_event_definition + 3 event_definition_crf rows linking each to Demographics

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: 7 subject + 7 study_subject rows (M-001 .. M-007), all enrolled in study_id=1

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: 21 study_event rows mirroring per-event status of MOCK_SUBJECTS

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: ~70 item_data rows — entered values for completed/in-progress event CRFs

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: 8 open queries on item_data — backs the openQueries count visible in the Subject Matrix

column.name: description
column.value: Height looks low for reported demographic — please confirm against source

column.name: description
column.value: BP not captured at V2 — was a measurement attempted?

column.name: description
column.value: Consent signed flag not set — please confirm

column.name: description
column.value: Weight field empty — required at baseline

column.name: description
column.value: BP outside expected range — please verify against source

column.name: description
column.value: Visit window deviation — outside protocol-specified range

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology
changeSet.comment: Advance sequences past seeded PKs to avoid collisions on first runtime insert
